Class Student

java.lang.Object
project2.Student
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Student>
Direct Known Subclasses:
NonResident, Resident
public abstract class Student extends Object implements Comparable<Student>
Defines a student in the system Includes student profile, major, and credits

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Student otherStudent)
      Overrides compareTo() method Uses student profiles to compare
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<Student>
      Parameters:
      otherStudent - the object to be compared.
      Returns:
      -1 if this.profile is before, 1 if otherStudent.profile is before, 0 if equal

      public int compareTo(Student otherStudent, String specification)
      Same functionality as other compareTo() function, used for overriding in Sort method

      specification -
      Returns:
      -1 if this.profile is before, 1 if otherStudent.profile is before, 0 if equal
